project_overview: Implement end-to-end product-led growth analytics, unify marketing and product attribution, and build a board-ready revenue reporting layer.
current_state: Events inconsistently tracked across web/app; last-click reports conflict with CRM. No trusted multi-touch model to inform paid spend. Fragmented dashboards, slow monthly close.
desired_outcomes: Reliable multi-touch attribution across self-serve and sales-assisted motions
Self-serve revenue dashboards in Looker for exec and GTM leaders
Faster, defensible CAC payback and LTV:CAC insights for budget reallocation
constraints: Team bandwidth limited; prefer 8-10 week implementation
Must preserve Salesforce and HubSpot data integrity
Security review required for any new integrations
